mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE MENU_TREE ( MENU_ID, MENU_NM, UP_MENU_ID, GRAD, USE_YN, ORDR, MENU_COURS, PATH, PATH_ORDR ) AS ( SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NM, UP_MENU_ID, GRAD, USE_YN, ORDR, MENU_COURS, CAST(MENU_ID AS VARCHAR(50)) AS PATH, LPAD(CAST(ORDR AS VARCHAR(3)), 3, '0') AS PATH_ORDR FROM MENU WHERE UP_MENU_ID = 'ME02000000' UNION ALL SELECT M.MENU_ID, M.MENU_NM, M.UP_MENU_ID, M.GRAD, M.USE_YN, CAST(CAST(MT.ORDR AS VARCHAR(10)) || CAST(M.ORDR AS VARCHAR(10)) AS INTEGER) AS ORDR, M.MENU_COURS, CAST(MT.PATH || '_' || M.MENU_ID AS VARCHAR(255)) AS PATH, MT.PATH_ORDR || '_' || LPAD(CAST(M.ORDR AS VARCHAR(3)), 3, '0') AS PATH_ORDR FROM MENU M JOIN MENU_TREE MT ON M.UP_MENU_ID = MT.MENU_ID ) SELECT * FROM MENU_TREE MT JOIN ( SELECT MENU_ID FROM MENU_AUTHOR A LEFT JOIN TS_USER B ON B.USER_AUTHOR = A.AUTHOR_ID WHERE B.USER_ID = #{ userId } AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ) SUB_A ON SUB_A.MENU_ID = MT.MENU_ID
WITH RECURSIVE MENU_TREE AS ( SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NM, UP_MENU_ID, GRAD, USE_AT, ORDR, MENU_COURS, CAST(MENU_ID AS TEXT) AS PATH, LPAD(CAST(ORDR AS TEXT), 3, '0') AS PATH_ORDR FROM "GTEMS".TS_MENU WHERE UP_MENU_ID = 'ME02000000' UNION ALL SELECT M.MENU_ID, M.MENU_NM, M.UP_MENU_ID, M.GRAD, M.USE_AT, (MT.ORDR::TEXT||M.ORDR::TEXT)::integer as ORDR, M.MENU_COURS, CAST(CONCAT(MT.PATH, '_', M.MENU_ID) AS TEXT) AS PATH, CONCAT(MT.PATH_ORDR, '_', LPAD(CAST(M.ORDR AS TEXT), 3, '0')) AS PATH_ORDR FROM "GTEMS".TS_MENU M INNER JOIN MENU_TREE MT ON M.UP_MENU_ID = MT.MENU_ID ) SELECT MT.MENU_ID, MT.MENU_NM, MT.UP_MENU_ID, MT.USE_AT, SUB_B.LVL3_MENU_ID, SUB_B.LVL3_MENU_COURS, MT.GRAD, MT.ORDR, MT.MENU_COURS, MT.PATH, MT.PATH_ORDR FROM MENU_TREE MT INNER JOIN ( SELECT A.MENU_ID FROM "GTEMS".TS_AUTHOR_MENU A LEFT JOIN "GTEMS".TS_USER B ON B.USER_AUTHOR = A.AUTHOR_ID WHERE B.USER_ID = #{ userId } AND A.USE_AT = 'Y' ) SUB_A ON SUB_A.MENU_ID = MT.MENU_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT A.MENU_ID AS LVL2_MENU_ID, B.MENU_ID AS LVL3_MENU_ID, B.MENU_COURS AS LVL3_MENU_COURS FROM "GTEMS".TS_MENU A INNER JOIN "GTEMS".TS_MENU B ON A.MENU_ID = B.UP_MENU_ID WHERE B.ORDR = 1 AND A.GRAD = 2 ) SUB_B ON SUB_B.LVL2_MENU_ID = MT.MENU_ID WHERE MT.USE_AT = 'Y' AND MT.MENU_ID LIKE 'ME02%' ORDER BY MT.ORDR::TEXT ASC
